verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلذَّٰرِيَٰتِ ذَرْوًۭا
verses.text: By the scatterers (with their) scattering,

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱلْحَٰمِلَٰتِ وِقْرًۭا
verses.text: and the bearers (with their) burden,

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱلْجَٰرِيَٰتِ يُسْرًۭا
verses.text: and the runners (with their) effortlessness,

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱلْمُقَسِّمَٰتِ أَمْرًا
verses.text: and the distributors (with their) affair!

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَصَادِقٌۭ
verses.text: Surely what you are promised is true indeed!

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنَّ ٱلدِّينَ لَوَٰقِعٌۭ
verses.text: Surely the Judgment is indeed going to fall!

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلْحُبُكِ
verses.text: By the sky with all its tracks!

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّكُمْ لَفِى قَوْلٍۢ مُّخْتَلِفٍۢ
verses.text: Surely you differ indeed in what you say!

verses.quran_arabic: يُؤْفَكُ عَنْهُ مَنْ أُفِكَ
verses.text: Whoever is deluded about it is (really) deluded.

verses.quran_arabic: قُتِلَ ٱلْخَرَّٰصُونَ
verses.text: May the guessers perish,

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى غَمْرَةٍۢ سَاهُونَ
verses.text: those who are in a flood (of confusion), heedless.

verses.quran_arabic: يَسْـَٔلُونَ أَيَّانَ يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: They ask, ‘When is the Day of Judgment?’

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ هُمْ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ يُفْتَنُونَ
verses.text: The Day when they will be tried over the Fire:

verses.quran_arabic: ذُوقُوا۟ فِتْنَتَكُمْ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
verses.text: ‘Taste your trial! This is what you were seeking to hurry.’

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَعُيُونٍ
verses.text: Surely the ones who guard (themselves) will be in (the midst of) gardens and springs,

verses.quran_arabic: ءَاخِذِينَ مَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَبْلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: taking whatever their Lord has given them. Surely before (this) they were doers of good.

verses.quran_arabic: كَانُوا۟ قَلِيلًۭا مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ مَا يَهْجَعُونَ
verses.text: Little of the night would they sleep,

verses.quran_arabic: وَبِٱلْأَسْحَارِ هُمْ يَسْتَغْفِرُونَ
verses.text: and in the mornings they would ask for forgiveness,

verses.quran_arabic: وَفِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِهِمْ حَقٌّۭ لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلْمَحْرُومِ
verses.text: and in their wealth (there was) a due (portion) for the beggar and the outcast.

verses.quran_arabic: وَفِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ءَايَٰتٌۭ لِّلْمُوقِنِينَ
verses.text: In the earth (there are) signs for the ones who are certain,

verses.quran_arabic: وَفِىٓ أَنفُسِكُمْ ۚ أَفَلَا تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: and (also) in yourselves. Do you not see?

verses.quran_arabic: وَفِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ رِزْقُكُمْ وَمَا تُوعَدُونَ
verses.text: And in the sky is your provision and what you are promised.

verses.quran_arabic: فَوَرَبِّ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِنَّهُۥ لَحَقٌّۭ مِّثْلَ مَآ أَنَّكُمْ تَنطِقُونَ
verses.text: By the Lord of the sky and the earth! Surely it is true indeed – (even) as what you (are able to) speak.

verses.quran_arabic: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ضَيْفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ ٱلْمُكْرَمِينَ
verses.text: Has the story come to you of the honored guests of Abraham?

verses.quran_arabic: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُوا۟ سَلَٰمًۭا ۖ قَالَ سَلَٰمٌۭ قَوْمٌۭ مُّنكَرُونَ
verses.text: When they entered upon him, and said, ‘Peace!,’ he said, ‘Peace! (You are) a people unknown (to me).’

verses.quran_arabic: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ فَجَآءَ بِعِجْلٍۢ سَمِينٍۢ
verses.text: So he turned to his family and brought a fattened calf,

verses.quran_arabic: فَقَرَّبَهُۥٓ إِلَيْهِمْ قَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ
verses.text: and he placed it near them. He said, ‘Will you not eat?’

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَوْجَسَ مِنْهُمْ خِيفَةًۭ ۖ قَالُوا۟ لَا تَخَفْ ۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَٰمٍ عَلِيمٍۢ
verses.text: And he began to feel a fear of them. They said, ‘Do not fear!’ And they gave him good news of a knowing boy.

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَقْبَلَتِ ٱمْرَأَتُهُۥ فِى صَرَّةٍۢ فَصَكَّتْ وَجْهَهَا وَقَالَتْ عَجُوزٌ عَقِيمٌۭ
verses.text: And then his wife came forward in a loud voice, and struck her face, and said, ‘An old woman, barren!’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.text: They said, ‘So (it will be)! Your Lord has said. Surely He – He is the Wise, the Knowing.’

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
verses.text: He said, ‘What is your business, you envoys?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ أُرْسِلْنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍۢ مُّجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: They said, ‘Surely we have been sent to a sinful people,

verses.quran_arabic: لِنُرْسِلَ عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةًۭ مِّن طِينٍۢ
verses.text: to send (down) on them stones of clay,

verses.quran_arabic: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُسْرِفِينَ
verses.text: marked by your Lord for the wanton.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَخْرَجْنَا مَن كَانَ فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: We (would have) brought out any of the believers who were in it,

verses.quran_arabic: فَمَا وَجَدْنَا فِيهَا غَيْرَ بَيْتٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
verses.text: but We found in it only one house of those who had submitted.

verses.quran_arabic: وَتَرَكْنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَةًۭ لِّلَّذِينَ يَخَافُونَ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ
verses.text: And We left in it a sign for those who fear the painful punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: وَفِى مُوسَىٰٓ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَٰهُ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ بِسُلْطَٰنٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
verses.text: And (there is also a sign) in Moses: when We sent him to Pharaoh with clear authority.

verses.quran_arabic: فَتَوَلَّىٰ بِرُكْنِهِۦ وَقَالَ سَٰحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌۭ
verses.text: But he turned away with his supporter(s), and said, ‘A magician or a man possessed!’

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَخَذْنَٰهُ وَجُنُودَهُۥ فَنَبَذْنَٰهُمْ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ وَهُوَ مُلِيمٌۭ
verses.text: So We seized him and his forces, and tossed them into the sea, (for) he was to blame.

verses.quran_arabic: وَفِى عَادٍ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلرِّيحَ ٱلْعَقِيمَ
verses.text: And (there is also a sign) in ‘Ād: when We sent upon them the desolating wind.

verses.quran_arabic: مَا تَذَرُ مِن شَىْءٍ أَتَتْ عَلَيْهِ إِلَّا جَعَلَتْهُ كَٱلرَّمِيمِ
verses.text: It left nothing it came upon, but made it like decayed (ruins).

verses.quran_arabic: وَفِى ثَمُودَ إِذْ قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَمَتَّعُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍۢ
verses.text: And (there is also a sign) in Thamūd: when it was said to them, ‘Enjoy (yourselves) for a time!’

verses.quran_arabic: فَعَتَوْا۟ عَنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّٰعِقَةُ وَهُمْ يَنظُرُونَ
verses.text: But they disdained the command of their Lord, and the thunderbolt took them while they were looking on,

verses.quran_arabic: فَمَا ٱسْتَطَٰعُوا۟ مِن قِيَامٍۢ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنتَصِرِينَ
verses.text: and they were not able to stand, nor were they helped.

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍۢ مِّن قَبْلُ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًۭا فَٰسِقِينَ
verses.text: And the people of Noah before (them) – surely they were a wicked people.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقَوۡمِ نُوحٖ مِّن قَبۡلُۖ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ قَوۡمٗا فَٰسِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And (likewise) before that, (in) the people of Noah—indeed, they were a defiantly disobedient people.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقَوۡمِ نُوحٖ مِّن قَبۡلُۖ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ قَوۡمٗا  فَٰسِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And (likewise) before that, (in) the people of Noah—indeed, they were a defiantly disobedient people.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بَنَيْنَٰهَا بِأَيْي۟دٍۢ وَإِنَّا لَمُوسِعُونَ
verses.text: The sky – We built it with (Our own) hands, and surely We were (its) extenders indeed.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ فَرَشْنَٰهَا فَنِعْمَ ٱلْمَٰهِدُونَ
verses.text: And the earth – We spread it out. Excellent were the smoothers!

verses.quran_arabic: وَمِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: And We created pairs of everything, so that you might take heed.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَمِن كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقۡنَا زَوۡجَيۡنِ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And We created all things in pairs, that youpl may constantly remember.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَمِن كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقۡنَا زَوۡجَيۡنِ  لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And We created all things in pairs, that youpl may constantly remember.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَمِن كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقۡنَا زَوۡجَيۡنِ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And We created all things in pairs, that youpl may constantly remember.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَمِن كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقۡنَا زَوۡجَيۡنِ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And We created all things in pairs, that you may remind yourselves.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَمِن كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقۡنَا زَوۡجَيۡنِ لَعَلَّكُمُۥ تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And We created all things in pairs, that youpl may constantly remember.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَمِن كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقۡنَا زَوۡجَيۡنِ لَعَلَّكُمُۥ تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And We created all things in pairs, that youpl may constantly remember.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَمِن كُلِّ شَےْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَّكَّرُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And We created all things in pairs, that youpl may constantly remember.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَمِن كُلِّ شَےْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَّكَّرُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And We created all things in pairs, that youpl may constantly remember.

verses.quran_arabic: فَفِرُّوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.text: So flee to God! Surely I am a clear warner for you from Him.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.text: And do not set up another god with God. Surely I am a clear warner for you from Him.

verses.quran_arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ مَآ أَتَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا قَالُوا۟ سَاحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
verses.text: (Even) so, not a messenger came to those who were before them, except they said, ‘A magician or a man possessed!’

verses.quran_arabic: أَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِهِۦ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌۭ طَاغُونَ
verses.text: Have they bequeathed it to each other? No! They are a people who transgress insolently.

verses.quran_arabic: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِمَلُومٍۢ
verses.text: So turn away from them, (for) you are not to be blamed,

verses.quran_arabic: وَذَكِّرْ فَإِنَّ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ تَنفَعُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: but remind (them). Surely the Reminder will benefit the believers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ ٱلْجِنَّ وَٱلْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ
verses.text: I did not create the jinn and humankind except to serve Me.

verses.quran_arabic: مَآ أُرِيدُ مِنْهُم مِّن رِّزْقٍۢ وَمَآ أُرِيدُ أَن يُطْعِمُونِ
verses.text: I do not desire any provision from them, nor do I desire that they should feed Me.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلرَّزَّاقُ ذُو ٱلْقُوَّةِ ٱلْمَتِينُ
verses.text: Surely God – He is the Provider, One full of power, the Firm.

verses.quran_arabic: فَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ ذَنُوبًۭا مِّثْلَ ذَنُوبِ أَصْحَٰبِهِمْ فَلَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونِ
verses.text: Surely for the ones who do evil (there will be) a portion like the portion of their companions. Let them not seek to hurry Me!

verses.quran_arabic: فَوَيْلٌۭ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن يَوْمِهِمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
verses.text: Woe to those who disbelieve on account of their Day which they are promised!
